Draft Term Sheet: Proposed Acquisition of a Controlling Stake in Isla Norte Foods Corporation
Acquirer: Barasoain Capital Holdings, Inc. (PH SEC Reg. No.: A2026-00X-9999; Company TIN: 000-000-000-000 for form reference only)
Target: Isla Norte Foods Corporation, a PSE-listed corporation (provisional symbol: INF0; CUSIP/ISIN: N/A placeholder), principal office at Unit 1601, Apo Center, Makisig District, Quezon Vista, Metro Manila
Structure: Purchase of approximately 40% of outstanding common shares from multiple selling shareholders via on-exchange cross and negotiated block, with mandatory tender offer analysis under SRC Rule 19
Consideration: Cash in Philippine pesos; price per share to be finalized post confirmatory due diligence; no financing contingency; settlement through Banco de Bahaghari, Inc. (subject to standard AML/KYC)
Disclosure: PSE EDGE immediate disclosure upon signing/closing and SEC Form 17-C within five business days from occurrence, consistent with PSE and SRC rules and issuer’s Disclosure Policy
Material non-public information note: Until posted on PSE EDGE, this term sheet and the contemplated transaction details may constitute material non-public information under the Securities Regulation Code
Issuer policy: Isla Norte’s insider-trading blackout window is scheduled for 01–15 July 2026 around interim results, during which directors/officers are restricted from trading
Conditions precedent: SEC clearance for any mandatory tender offer; PSE approval for special block sale if applicable; BIR tax clearances; third-party consents; completion of legal, financial, and tax due diligence
Regulatory references: SRC Rule 19 (Tender Offers), SRC Rule 23 (Insider Trading), PSE Revised Disclosure Rules; no waivers requested or expected at term sheet stage
Background (public): As disclosed in Isla Norte’s 2025 Integrated Annual Report on PSE EDGE dated 15 April 2026, its packaging line modernization was completed in Q4 2025 and a new regional distributor was appointed for Visayas markets
Press coverage (public): General press releases dated 12 January 2025 referenced a potential strategic review; this term sheet does not update or confirm any such reports
